title: Mesha' #4852
definition:
Mesha = "freedom"

 1) a region marking one of the limits of the territory of the
    Joktanites when they first settled in Arabia
nasbUsage:
Definition: Mesha = "freedom"

 1) a region marking one of the limits of the territory of the
    Joktanites when they first settled in Arabia

    NASB:  one extremity of the territory of the Joktanites
